plugins.name: luna-correlate
plugins.description: Offline health-factor correlation MCP (Posture A). Cross-references local health/status series against external factors — Kp geomagnetic index (date-only) and location factors (barometric pressure, pollen, air-quality) resolved offline via a proximity index — and surfaces ranked CANDIDATE signals with caveats; never a diagnosis, never causation. Only the gated factors.cache fetcher touches the network (country-level grid, no PHI, no operator coordinates).

plugins.name: himmel-ops
plugins.description: Harness-meta operational skills for himmel. Load-on-trigger guardrail-recovery playbook (stuck-playbook) that surfaces escape-hatches when an auto-mode write is denied, a Bash command falls through to the classifier, a permission prompt hangs, or a pre-push gate fails — so operational/troubleshooting rules stay out of the always-on root CLAUDE.md (HIMMEL-211).

plugins.name: handover
plugins.description: Handover tracking system — manages epics, tasks, standalones, and session handovers

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit-himmel
plugins.description: [yotamleo minimal fork] Vendored code-reviewer agent from pr-review-toolkit + HIMMEL-178 verify-before-critical sub-rule patch. Other 5 agents stay upstream (use pr-review-toolkit:* namespace). See marketplace/plugins/pr-review-toolkit-himmel/README.md for the fork rationale + upstream-watch protocol.

plugins.name: telegram-himmel
plugins.description: [yotamleo fork] Telegram channel plugin with the getUpdates poller gated behind TELEGRAM_OWN_POLLER=1, so only the designated owner session polls and ad-hoc claude windows can't steal the single bot-token poll slot. Forked from telegram@claude-plugins-official v0.0.6 — see marketplace/plugins/telegram-himmel/README.md.

plugins.name: obsidian-triage
plugins.description: Autonomous triage + cross-clip synthesis for Obsidian Web Clipper output. /triage-clips summarizes each clip, infers tags from the existing vault tag set, suggests Related Notes via link-graph proximity, extracts Action Items to today's daily note, annotates a Promotion candidate, marks processed:true (idempotent). /synthesize-clips finds recurring patterns across processed clips and writes vault-restructuring proposals.

plugins.name: claude-obsidian
plugins.description: [yotamleo fork — vendor + attribution only, no upstream PR] Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Wiki query, save, ingest, lint, autoresearch. Companion to obsidian-triage — its wiki-query skill optionally powers the Phase 4 Related Notes link-graph traversal. Pinned to an immutable tag per himmel supply-chain policy (a bare commit SHA is NOT installable — `claude plugin install` clones via `git clone --branch <ref>`, which only resolves branch/tag names; see marketplace/plugins/obsidian-triage/README.md § Pin update workflow). Fork tracks upstream AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian (v1.9.2 base) with the unsupported prompt-type SessionStart/PostCompact hooks removed. Original: AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian.
